prompt: Order these mathematical milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Euclid's Elements written
events.fact: 300 BC — foundation of geometry and number theory

events.title: Al-Khwarizmi's Algebra
events.fact: 820 AD — introduces systematic solution of linear equations

events.title: Fibonacci's Liber Abaci
events.fact: 1202 AD — introduces Hindu-Arabic numerals to Europe

events.title: Calculus developed
events.fact: 1665 — Newton and Leibniz independently create calculus

events.title: Bridges of Königsberg solved
events.fact: 1736 — Leonhard Euler lays foundation of graph theory

events.title: Fermat's Last Theorem proved
events.fact: 1994 — Andrew Wiles publishes proof after 358 years

events.title: Poincaré Conjecture proved
events.fact: 2003 — Grigori Perelman solves century-old topology puzzle
